note: Figma-ready structured cards for manual import or MCP automation.

cards.title: Primary friction for Priya Sharma
cards.evidence: Wait a minute. I thought I was supposed to create an account first. But the page says 'Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps.' That's weird. Did it automatically log me in with some default account?

cards.title: Primary friction for David Lee
cards.evidence: Okay, now that I've signed out (presumably), I'll look for the email/password creation. Actually, after logging out, I'm not directed to a page where I can create a new account. The task says to create an account using email/password but I can't see any option to do so.

cards.title: Primary friction for Sarah Chen
cards.evidence: Okay, there are already tasks listed. 'Football', 'Book the Field', 'Capstone Meeting', 'Prepare the Presentation', 'Revise the Draft', 'Become a Student Athlete'. These are NOT bakery tasks. This is very confusing! Are these examples?

cards.title: Primary friction for Emily Carter
cards.evidence: I don't see any indication that I can create an account or logout to create one. Let's try adding a new task to see what happens. Maybe it will prompt me for login details then. Clicking 'Add New Task'.

cards.title: Primary friction for Mark Johnson
cards.evidence: "Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps." What the...? I didn't log in. Did they just hallucinate my login? Big security red flag right there.
